zh.lifeSummary: Jean II de Ghistelle是Gauthier van Voormezeele III的兒子，於1245年8月11日出生在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫希斯特爾。他於1260年之前與Margaretha willem van Lichtervelde在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1289年6月12日享年43歲，埋葬在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫希斯特爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jean II de Ghistelle是Gauthier van Voormezeele III的儿子，于1245年8月11日出生在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫希斯特爾。他于1260年之前与Margaretha willem van Lichtervelde在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1289年6月12日享年43岁，埋葬在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫希斯特爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: Jean II de Ghistelle was born on 11 August 1245, in Gistel, West Flanders, Belgium as the son of Gauthier van Voormezeele III. He married Margaretha willem van Lichtervelde before 1260, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 12 June 1289, at the age of 43, and was buried in Gistel, West Flanders, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Jean II de Ghistelle est né le 11 août 1245, à Gistel, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, fils de Gauthier van Voormezeele III. Il a épousé Margaretha willem van Lichtervelde avant 1260, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 12 juin 1289, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Gistel, Flandre occidentale, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Jean II de Ghistelle wurde am 11. August 1245 in Gistel, West-Flandern, Belgien, als Sohn von Gauthier van Voormezeele III geboren. Er hat vor 1260 in Europa Margaretha willem van Lichtervelde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Juni 1289 im Alter von 43 Jahren und wurde in Gistel, West-Flandern, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Jean II de Ghistelle è nato il il 11 agosto 1245 nel Gistel, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio come figlio di Gauthier van Voormezeele III. Lui sposato Margaretha willem van Lichtervelde prima del 1260, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 12 giugno 1289, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Gistel, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio.

ja.Gistel, West Flanders, Belgium: ベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンギステル
ja.Zandvliet, Antwerp, Antwerp, Belgium: ベルギーアントウエルペンアントウエルペンザンドvリート
ja.Gistel: ベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンギステル
ja.lifeSummary: Jean II de Ghistelleは1245年8月11日にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンギステルでGauthier van Voormezeele IIIの息子として生まれた。1260年以前にヨーロッパでMargaretha willem van Lichterveldeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1289年6月12日に43歳で死去し，ベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンギステルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean II de Ghistelle(은)는 1245년 8월 11일 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 지스텔에서 Gauthier van Voormezeele III의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1260년 이전 우럽에서 Margaretha willem van Lichtervelde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1289년 6월 12일 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 지스텔에 묻혔다.

mn.11 August 1245–12 June 1289: 1245 оны Наймдугаар сарын 11–1289 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 12

pt.11 August 1245–12 June 1289: 11 de agosto de 1245–12 de junho de 1289
pt.lifeSummary: Jean II de Ghistelle nasceu em 11 de agosto de 1245, em Gistel, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica filho de Gauthier van Voormezeele III. Ele casou-se com Margaretha willem van Lichtervelde antes 1260, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de junho de 1289, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Gistel, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Jean II de Ghistelle родился 11 августа 1245 г. в местности гистел, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия. Его отца звали Gauthier van Voormezeele III. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaretha willem van Lichtervelde перед 1260 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 12 июня 1289 г. в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности гистел, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия.

es.11 August 1245–12 June 1289: 11 de agosto de 1245–12 de junio de 1289
es.lifeSummary: Jean II de Ghistelle nació el 11 de agosto de 1245, en Gistel, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica como hijo de Gauthier van Voormezeele III. Se casó con Margaretha willem van Lichtervelde antes de 1260, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de junio de 1289, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Gistel, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica.
